about.open-to-work: Currently open to new opportunities as a Senior Developer or Tech Lead.
about.comment-using-website: Because using a website is a skill now ?

excerpts.connect-desc: As the sole engineer at NEO-OOH (Quebecor Media), I designed and built their entire internal platform from scratch, from stack selection and architecture to database design, UI, and deployment.
excerpts.dvin-desc: A Web3 platform for tokenized wine bottles built on Solana. Users buy, trade, and redeem Digital Corks (NFTs) representing real wine bottles.
excerpts.autotrader-desc: A personal algorithmic trading platform built on Interactive Brokers. Backtesting, Bayesian optimization, and live execution across 11+ trading algorithms.
excerpts.dealership-desc: Sales data analysis platform for car dealerships. Work in progress.
excerpts.neo-desc: Before Connect, I built multiple projects for Neo-OOH as a freelance developer: their public website, a content management platform handling 60M+ monthly impressions, and real-time dynamic content systems.
excerpts.prisme-desc: Interactive and immersive art installations combining technology and ontological questioning, as part of a six-person artist collective.
excerpts.runner-desc: A fast fuzzy finder for TouchDesigner
excerpts.td-library-desc: A collection of reusable components made to ease the learning curve of TouchDesigner and improve its accessibility.
